types.interaction_logic: Most effective against brittle structures and Skeletons. Often resisted by incorporeal beings unless magical.
Standard weapon damage. Almost no vulnerabilities exist in the bestiary, making it consistent but rarely 'bonus' damage.
Triggers 'Splitting' in Oozes (Black Pudding/Ochre Jelly). Effective against plant-based creatures.
Stops regeneration in Trolls. Heavily resisted by Fiends and Oozes.
types.status_trigger: Corroded (Optional: AC reduction to non-magical armor)

types.interaction_logic: Slows Fire Elementals. Resisted by Undead and Arctic-dwellers.
Highest count of vulnerabilities (Plants, Insects) but also highest count of resistances (Fiends, Dragons).
Often prevents targets from taking Reactions. Can jump (arc) to adjacent targets in water.
Highly effective against Earth Elementals and crystalline constructs. Very few resistances exist.
Statistically the 'weakest' type; nearly 100+ monsters are totally Immune (Undead, Constructs, Fiends).
The 'Gold Standard' of damage. Virtually nothing in the multiverse resists it except the Helmed Horror.

types.description: The energy of decay and death.
types.interaction_logic: Heals certain Undead (like the Atropal). Reduces Max HP in players.
Ignores all physical armor. Immune: Constructs and mindless Oozes.
Devastating to Undead/Fiends. Stops Vampire regeneration and Zombie 'Undead Fortitude'.

notes: These are not standalone types but 'Tags' that modify Physical damage to bypass resistances.

modifiers.effect: Bypasses standard 'Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from Non-magical Attacks'.
Bypasses resistances of Lycanthropes (Werewolves), Devils, and Wraiths.
Automatically crits against objects and bypasses Golem/Construct damage reduction.
Bypasses the inherent damage reduction of Fey and certain high-level Demons.
